title: Gully Boy
subTitle: The life of an underdog rapper from Dharavi who struggles to express his views on social issues through rapping, changes completely after he bumps into Shrikant alias MC Sher.

title: Babumoshai Bandookbaaz
subTitle: Babu Bihari, a professional contract killer, is assigned a target by Jiji, a ruthless politician. However, during his mission, when he meets Fulwa, a young woman, things go awry.

title: Mr. X
subTitle: After gaining the power of invisibility, Raghu becomes a vigilante in order to take revenge on those who have wronged him and his lover.

title: Phobia
subTitle: A woman becomes agoraphobic after being assaulted by a taxi driver. She becomes convinced that a malevolent force has taken over the very home in which she is trapped.

title: Ganga
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Notebook
subTitle: Hoping for a change, a former army officer takes a job as a teacher at a remote school in Kashmir. When he discovers a notebook from a previous instructor, he soon finds himself falling in love with a woman he has never met.

title: Waqt: The Race Against Time
subTitle: A businessman disowns his spoiled son, Aditya, after he marries a girl from a rival family. Upon discovering his father's lung cancer, Aditya resolves to change for the better.

title: Mili
subTitle: Mili, a young woman, accidentally gets stuck in a walk-in freezer at her workplace. Racing against time, she must find a way to survive.

title: Khatta Meetha
subTitle: A seemingly corrupt petty contractor faces challenges from the local municipality, his family, his employees, as well as a former girlfriend and her family.

title: Heropanti 2
subTitle: A vigilante is sent on a mission by the government to kill enemy troops. However, things go wrong when he's mistaken for the leader of the troops.

title: Raazi
subTitle: As diplomatic tensions rise in 1971, a daring Kashmiri woman walks the tightrope between marriage and duty, delving into the shadows of espionage to protect her motherland.

title: Phata Poster Nikla Hero
subTitle: Vishwas, the son of a widow, wants to be an actor despite his mother's wish that he become a police inspector. However, his life takes a turn when he gets entangled with a criminal gang.

title: Phata Poster Nikla Hero
subTitle: Vishwas, the son of a widow, wants to be an actor despite his mother's wish that he become a police inspector. However, his life takes a turn when he gets entangled with a criminal gang.

title: Blank
subTitle: A suicide bomber named Hanif loses his memory before he could complete his mission. Resultantly, the Anti-Terrorism Squad must find out his real plan and save the country from a deadly attack.

title: Murder 2
subTitle: When a slew of sex workers disappear, Arjun, a former police officer, is brought in to crack the case. Subsequently, as he works undercover with Reshma, a young prostitute, she too disappears.

title: Farrey
subTitle: Brought up in an orphanage, child prodigy Niyati gets admitted into a prestigious school. Soon, surrounded by money, she gets engulfed in a cheating racket.

title: Omerta
subTitle: Ahmed Omar Saeed Sheikh, a British terrorist of Pakistani descent, plots the kidnapping and murder of Wall Street Journal journalist Daniel Pearl.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Bheed
subTitle: A policeman, a victim of bigotry, takes on the task of preventing migrants from crossing state borders during a major health crisis. However, tensions arise as the ground reality of prejudice emerges.

title: Good Newwz
subTitle: Two married couples are unsuccessful in conceiving and seek medical treatment. However, they end up in a complicated situation after their doctor makes a blunder.

title: Nill Battey Sannata
subTitle: When Apeksha loses her interest in academics, her mother Chanda joins school to complete her education and motivate Apeksha.

title: Lakshya
subTitle: Karan, an aimless young man, joins the Indian Army on a whim but backs out when he finds a soldier's life to be difficult. When this creates conflict with his girlfriend, he rejoins to make her proud.

title: Chandu Champion
subTitle: An extraordinary man confronts relentless challenges with unwavering determination. His spirit and resilience propel him through adversity, ultimately forging a path to historic achievement.

title: Pippa
subTitle: Balram Singh Mehta of the 45th Cavalry tank squadron steps up to prove his worth by fighting on the eastern front during the Indo-Pakistani war of 1971.

title: Pippa
subTitle: Balram Singh Mehta of the 45th Cavalry tank squadron steps up to prove his worth by fighting on the eastern front during the Indo-Pakistani war of 1971.

title: Jism
subTitle: Kabir, an alcoholic lawyer, falls in love with Sonia, the wife of a travelling millionaire, who convinces him to murder her husband. Later, Kabir is shocked to learn of her motivation for the murder.

title: Hacked
subTitle: Sameera finds her life crumbling when her teenage neighbour Vivek hacks into all her social media after she rejects his advances.

title: Khamoshiyan
subTitle: Kabir, a struggling writer, journeys to Kashmir seeking inspiration and takes lodging in a mysterious guesthouse. He finds himself falling for Meera, the enigmatic owner, who harbours a dark secret.

title: Love Hostel
subTitle: A series of bloodshed, escapes and deception ensue when Jyothi and Ashu elope together and her family hires a ruthless mercenary to kill the couple.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Trapped
subTitle: Trapped

title: Saand Ki Aankh
subTitle: Two determined women in a conservative village quietly train in sharpshooting and defy expectations with their extraordinary skill and unbreakable resolve.

title: Saajan Chale Sasural
subTitle: After Shyamsunder presumes that his first wife Pooja died in a flood, he marries Divya. When he learns that Pooja is alive, he has to juggle between his wives, keeping both his marriages a secret.

title: Double Dhamaal
subTitle: Four idlers make elaborate plans to earn money by investing in buildings but are conned by Kabir, who leaves them unemployed and penniless. Soon, they are on the prowl to avenge their humiliation.

title: Mr. & Mrs. Mahi
subTitle: Former cricketer Mahendra marries Mahima, a doctor with a passion for cricket. However, upon discovering her exceptional skills, he encourages her to pursue a professional career in the sport.

title: Janhit Mein Jaari
subTitle: With the will to break taboo as her armour of choice, Mannu embarks to work as a condom salesperson, despite the reservations of her family and society.
